scenarios.input_task: Answer a simple repository question without edits.
scenarios.pass_criteria: Answer does not run full Guardian or release checks.
Report includes repo, branch, status, risk, and next step only.

scenarios.input_task: Fix a single typo in one Markdown file.
scenarios.pass_criteria: Validation is scoped to identity, dirty tree, scope, and git diff --check.

scenarios.input_task: Update docs-only wording without changing ownership or public claims.
scenarios.pass_criteria: Owner/source-of-truth check runs; Feature Lifecycle and full Guardian are skipped.

scenarios.input_task: Prepare a PR-ready handoff report for docs-only work without creating the PR.
scenarios.pass_criteria: Uses compact handoff and does not run release or merge gates.

scenarios.input_task: Produce a clean-start status report after a docs PR already merged.
scenarios.pass_criteria: Reports current state without re-running full release validation.

scenarios.input_task: Commit docs-only changes on an already scoped branch.
scenarios.pass_criteria: Commit validation stays docs-only; ordinary branch HEAD movement is not treated as L4.

scenarios.input_task: Update compact Project Memory after a small docs-only state correction.
scenarios.pass_criteria: Memory update stays scoped and does not become architecture review.

scenarios.input_task: Add or version a checklist, template, or validation asset.
scenarios.pass_criteria: Layer boundary and manifest/reference checks run.
Example boundaries and leakage checks run.

scenarios.input_task: Update a core contract without changing architecture ownership.
scenarios.pass_criteria: Core owner and adjacent standards are checked.

scenarios.input_task: Change rule ownership or source-of-truth boundaries.
scenarios.pass_criteria: Architecture review, owner map, and memory checks run.
Feature Lifecycle artifacts are required before implementation.

scenarios.input_task: Add a new public workflow that requires feature artifacts.
scenarios.pass_criteria: FEATURE, CLARIFICATION, PLAN, and TASKS are present or implementation stops.

scenarios.input_task: Transfer material from a source-reference repository.
scenarios.pass_criteria: Include/review/exclude matrix and sanitization checks run.

scenarios.input_task: Prepare release version, tag, or release PR into main.
scenarios.pass_criteria: Release Guardian, version, changelog, and manifest checks run.

scenarios.input_task: Merge, branch synchronization, or branch cleanup.
scenarios.pass_criteria: Branch policy, clean start, and recovery state checks run.

scenarios.input_task: Modify runtime, CLI, automation, dependencies, or integrations.
scenarios.pass_criteria: Stops unless explicitly approved and routed to the correct owner.
